meta.title: Furkan Tunalı CV
meta.description: Experienced AI, software and platform engineer architecting scalable, innovative solutions for multi-cloud environments, optimizing developer experience across web development, full-stack. Currently working with AI to reimagine software functionality and create intelligent solutions.

summary: Senior software & AI engineer building scalable full-stack systems, cloud infrastructure, and agentic AI pipelines.

skills.items: LangGraph, LangChain, LangSmith, Ollama, MCP, PydanticAI, AutoGen, Claude API, OpenAI, Gemini and Tavily APIs
Kubernetes, AWS, GCP, Azure, Docker, Terraform, Nginx, Cloudflare, Grafana, Loki, Prometheus, GitHub Actions, CircleCI, Jenkins, TeamCity
Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Ruby, PHP, NestJS, Express
React, NextJS, Vue.js, Nuxt, HTML, CSS, PostCSS, SCSS, Wireframing

projects.name: Newsify Today
projects.subtitle: AI news platform & ChatGPT App (MCP App)
projects.intro: Agentic AI pipeline curates, scores, and summarizes trending news in real time across worldwide regions and languages.
bullets: LangGraph agent with 9 tools; self-hosted Ollama (Qwen) across 3 nodes with health-aware routing and Gemini fallback — near-zero inference cost.
MCP server with OpenAI Apps SDK widget — shipped as an early ChatGPT App.
3-node Kubernetes on-prem, SSE streaming to Next.js, CI/CD via GitHub Actions; observability with LangSmith and Grafana.
projects.stack: TypeScript, Python, NestJS, Next.js, React, LangGraph, LangChain, Ollama, Gemini API, PostgreSQL, Redis, BullMQ, MicroK8s, Docker, Cloudflare Tunnels, Grafana/Loki/Tempo, MCP SDK, Turborepo

subroles.title: Senior AI Solutions Engineer
bullets: Built an AI system with OpenAI and Tavily APIs to auto-identify GDPR-relevant vendors from customer input — retrieving hosting locations, DPO emails, and privacy policy links; evaluated PydanticAI and AutoGen for agent workflows.

subroles.title: Senior Infrastructure Engineer
bullets: Led ECS → Kubernetes (EKS) migration with zero downtime; created Terraform setups from scratch across AWS suite (Fargate, CloudFormation, ECR, RDS, Route53, Lambda).

subroles.title: Senior DX Engineer
bullets: Migrated monolith Rails to microservices monorepo, containerized apps, built CI/CD with GitHub Actions and Terraform.

Supported cross-team delivery, mentored engineers, and automated DevOps/DX tooling; implemented event-driven scheduling via AWS EventBridge for automated client reminders and migrated infra from Heroku to AWS ECS.

recentExperiences.stack: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, NestJS, NextJS, Rails, Vue, Kubernetes, EKS, Terraform, AWS, Docker, GitHub Actions

bullets: AI/ML workloads on Azure CUDA; OAuth2 decentralized auth across partner systems; MVP monorepo with CI/CD, Terraform, and automated semantic versioning.

bullets: Architected and refactored back-end services, developed full-stack features for gaming content management platform.

bullets: Led front-end team (hiring, mentoring, delivery); drove monolith → unified full-stack JS + cloud; built UI component library bridging UX and front-end, with A/B testing.
recentExperiences.stack: React, GraphQL, Redux, AWS, Koa, MongoDB, WebPack, Magento

bullets: Full-stack JavaScript with AWS Lambda queue processing for image analysis; integrated MongoDB, Stripe, SalesForce with full test coverage.

bullets: Led front-end for ASDA UK (Walmart) wholesale portal; designed architecture for a recruiting startup.
